name: SCC_CreatePaymentDetailsRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreatePaymentDetailsRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreatePaymentDetailsRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], byte GenChallenge[], long Timestamp )
description: Creates a Payment Details Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
